name: brainbudget
description: BrainBudget for Codex using AI Stupid Level and local repository signals.

interface.shortDescription: Spends extra Codex brain when reliability starts wobbling.
interface.longDescription: BrainBudget is the ARC layer that combines AI Stupid Level data, repository health, and task risk to pick Codex planning and verification policy.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use BrainBudget to choose a Codex workflow before editing.
